diagnoses.name: End stage renal disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: known end stage renal disease requiring hemodialysis three times weekly and is currently awaiting organ transplant

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris
diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris

diagnoses.name: Nonrheumatic aortic valve stenosis with insufficiency
Pneumonia of unspecified organism
diagnoses.evidence_span: evidence of pneumonia of unspecified organism

diagnoses.name: Anemia secondary to chronic kidney disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: anemia secondary to chronic kidney disease

diagnoses.name: Chronic dorsalgia and left shoulder pain
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic pain with dorsalgia, left shoulder pain

diagnoses.name: Other forms of acute ischemic heart disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: initial assessment was concerning for acute ischemic heart disease

procedures.name: Hemodialysis
procedures.evidence_span: performance of urinary filtration (hemodialysis) on multiple occasions to manage volume status and electrolytes given end stage renal disease

procedures.name: Pneumococcal 23-valent polysaccharide vaccine
procedures.evidence_span: The patient received pneumococcal 23-valent polysaccharide vaccine during admission

medications.name: Gabapentin
medications.evidence_span: Gabapentin 100 mg and 300 mg PO twice daily

medications.name: Metoprolol Tartrate
medications.evidence_span: Metoprolol Tartrate 6.25 mg PO twice daily

medications.name: Levofloxacin
medications.evidence_span: Levofloxacin 500 mg PO daily (complete full course)

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 650 mg PO every 6 hours as needed

medications.name: Albuterol
medications.evidence_span: Albuterol 0.083% nebulized solution one treatment as needed

medications.name: Heparin
medications.evidence_span: Heparin SC 5000 units twice daily (bridge therapy until anticoagulation established)

medications.name: Ferric Gluconate
medications.evidence_span: Ferric Gluconate 125 mg IV at next hemodialysis session

medications.name: Heparin drip
medications.evidence_span: anticoagulation via heparin drip (with dosing adjustments between 750-1500 units IV)

chief_complaint: Shortness of breath and chest discomfort
